name: Amber Vault Archive
description: High-density project registry with system-level adaptive theming and SEO optimization.

sections.title: The Registry Engine
sections.content: Built with a reactive JSON-driven architecture. The entire vault is powered by a single source of truth, allowing for real-time filtering and ultra-fast dynamic routing without database overhead.

sections.title: Adaptive Aesthetics
sections.content: Implemented a system-aware CSS variable engine. The Amber theme shifts its saturation and luminosity based on the user's OS preference to maintain perfect accessibility (WCAG AA) in both modes.

learnings: Dynamic routing in Vue 3 requires careful scroll-behavior management for a premium SPA feel.
Custom SVG grain textures are more performance-efficient than high-res noise pngs.

name: Neural Newsletter
description: AI-powered newsletter engine with Inngest integration and automated delivery pipelines.

sections.title: Pipeline Automation
sections.content: Leveraging Inngest's event-driven architecture to handle long-running generative tasks. The engine decouples user requests from AI processing to ensure zero-timeout delivery.

learnings: Reliability in AI products comes from robust queue management, not just prompt engineering.
Edge functions significantly reduce latency for global newsletter distribution.
